screen.bannerboundantiquity.hammer_hint: Drag down to swing — release on the green before it shrinks
message.bannerboundantiquity.need_stick: You need a stick to haft this.
message.bannerboundantiquity.crucible_co: The crucible has cooled — reheat it in a bloomery.
message.bannerboundantiquity.cast_underf: The casting failed — not enough metal.
death.bannerbound.wolfsbane.title: Paralyzed
death.bannerbound.wolfsbane.flavor: Your muscles locked and your breath stilled.
death.bannerbound.belladonna.title: Lost to Shadows
death.bannerbound.belladonna.flavor: You wandered into the nightmares and never returned.
death.bannerbound.oleander.title: Heart Stopped
death.bannerbound.oleander.flavor: Your heart faltered, then gave out.
bannerbound.vanilla.storage_locked: Your settlement hasn't learned to build storage like this yet — use a basket.
bannerbound.job.carpenter.desc: Works a woodworking workshop, sawing stocked wood into queued building parts and tools.
bannerbound.job.potter.desc: Works a pottery workshop, shaping stocked clay into vessels, bricks, and crucibles.
bannerboundantiquity.armorer.title: Armorer's Workbench
bannerboundantiquity.carpentry.saw.title: Sawing
bannerboundantiquity.carpentry.saw.hint: Hold left-click and move the mouse up and down to saw
bannerboundantiquity.carpentry.empty_lis: Queue an output first (click the floating preview)
bannerbound.job.mason.desc: Works a masonry workshop, chiseling stocked stone into slabs, stairs, walls, bricks and polished blocks.
bannerboundantiquity.masonry.chisel.hint: Click (or space) as the marker crosses the centre to strike
bannerboundantiquity.masonry.empty_list: Queue an output first (click the floating preview)
bannerboundantiquity.kiln.locked: Research Kilns before you can clay cobblestone.
bannerboundantiquity.stockpile.locked: Research Storage Logistics before you can weave a basket into a stockpile.
bannerboundantiquity.fletching_station.l: Research Fletching before you can bind a fletching station.
tooltip.bannerboundantiquity.stone_cooki: Right-click a water source to fill, then place
Place over a lit campfire to heat it
Right-click with food to add ingredients
Right-click empty-handed to eat a serving
bannerboundantiquity.hud.cooking_pot.fil: Right-click with a water bucket to fill
bannerboundantiquity.hud.cooking_pot.add: Add food to cook a stew
bannerboundantiquity.hud.cooking_pot.pla: Place over a lit campfire, then add food
bannerboundantiquity.pottery.title: Pottery
bannerboundantiquity.pottery.hint: Hold left-click and spin the mouse
bannerboundantiquity.pottery.locked: Research Pottery before you can shape a Pottery Slab.
bannerboundantiquity.mortar.locked: Research Herbalism before you can grind with a Mortar and Pestle.
bannerboundantiquity.mortar.title: Mortar and Pestle
bannerboundantiquity.mortar.press: Hold left-click to press the pestle down
bannerboundantiquity.mortar.grind: Now grind — move the mouse in circles
bannerboundantiquity.ghost_fill.missing: You don't have any of the missing ingredients
bannerbound.knapping.title: Knapping
bannerbound.knapping.shape_hint: Chip away stone to shape a tool head
bannerbound.knapping.no_research: You haven't learned how to knap stone.
bannerbound.knapping.strike_hint: Tap SPACE as each circle hits the ring
bannerboundantiquity.tanning.title: Scraping
bannerboundantiquity.tanning.hint: Hold left-click and swipe to scrape the hide
bannerbound.research.effect.unlock.brewe: Unlocks the Brewer — a crafter who pestles fermentables and keeps the troughs brewing
bannerbound.research.effect.unlock.cook: Unlocks the Cook — a crafter who keeps the kitchen's stew pots simmering
bannerbound.research.effect.unlock.smith: Unlocks the Smith — a crafter who works the bloomery, casts molds, and hammers metal tools
That post is too far away for one rope
bannerboundantiquity.configuration.title: Bannerbound: Antiquity Configs
Place items on the Crafting Stone in any order.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.fletching.note: Commit the pile, then complete %s stretch releases.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.pottery.note: Place clay on the slab, pick this output, then complete %s spin(s).
bannerboundantiquity.jei.casting.note: Melt %s mB of ore in a crucible, heat it in a Bloomery until molten, then pour into the fired mould.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.casting.note.br: Alloy %s mB of bronze in the crucible (keep copper 60–90%%, tin 10–40%%), then pour into the fired mould.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.cold_hammer.not: Cold-hammer the part on a Stone Anvil (%s strikes). The timing minigame sets the tool's quality.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.carpentry.note: Add %s log(s), queue the output, then complete the sawing minigame for %s item(s).
bannerboundantiquity.jei.carpentry.assem: Add the materials, queue the output, then complete the sawing minigame for %s item(s).
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.kn: Right-click a hard stone surface with Gravel. Consumes gravel; 25% chance for Flint.
Right-click a hard stone surface with Flint to knap a Flint Blade.
Right-click a hard stone surface with Bone to knap 2 Bone Blades.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.cu: Break grass or ferns with a blade or knife. 50% chance for Plant Fiber.
Break leaves with a blade or knife. 40% chance for Sticks.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.fl: Combine in your 2×2 inventory crafting grid. The Flint Knife carves your first Crafting Stone.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.co: Combine 4 Stone Rocks in your 2×2 inventory crafting grid. Bootstraps cobblestone for your first Crafting Stone.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.cr: Right-click cobblestone, sandstone, or red sandstone with a Flint Blade or knife.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.ch: Right-click an isolated log with an axe. Connected tree logs are ignored.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.sp: Put logs on the stump, then right-click with an axe. Each swing has 50% Firewood chance.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.st: Place Firewood on the ground, then add 3 more. The fourth becomes an unlit Campfire.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.fi: Hold use for 2 seconds while aiming. Lights an unlit Campfire or open Bloomery.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.mo: Shift-right-click a water-filled Mortar with a Glass Bottle to scoop the water back out.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.bl: Stack 2 Mud Bricks, then right-click the lower block with a Block of Coal.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.ki: Right-click Cobblestone with Clay Balls to make Clayed Cobblestone, then build a 2×2×2 cube of it to form a Kiln (after researching Kilns).
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.po: Right-click a Clayed Cobblestone with 2 Clay Balls after researching Pottery.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.wo: Right-click one of two adjacent logs with a Bone Saw. The saw loses durability.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.ma: Right-click one of two adjacent Stone or Cobblestone blocks with a Stone Chisel. The chisel loses durability.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.ta: Right-click a 2×2 square of logs with a blade or knife. The logs become a Tanning Rack; the tool loses durability.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.dr: Right-click a single log with a bone blade. The log becomes a Drying Rack of that wood.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.st: Right-click Cobblestone with a Basket to weave it into a Stockpile (after researching Storage Logistics).
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.fl: Right-click Cobblestone with Plant String to bind a Fletching Station (after researching Fletching).
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.ra: Right-click a straight line of 3 Thatch blocks with an Oar. The thatch becomes a raft.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.ro: Right-click two rope fence posts or gate uprights with Fiber Rope to tie them together.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.ra: Leash a raft to yourself, then right-click a fence with Fiber Rope to hitch it.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.sp: Throw a spear at fish. With Fiber Rope in offhand, the catch can be reeled back.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.cl: Break a manure pat for Dung. A shovel clears it faster. Manure is left by penned livestock and lowers the pen's fertility until removed.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.fe: Right-click crops or saplings with Dung to speed their growth, exactly like bone meal. Requires the Fertilization research.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.construction.im: Right-click a Clay Mold Base with a wood or stone tool of that shape to imprint it, then fire the mould in a Kiln.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.crafting_s: Carve it first, then place loose ingredients on top. Matching piles show a floating result preview.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.fletching_: A Fletching Station uses loose ingredient piles and a timing minigame to determine crafted quality.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.pottery_sl: A Pottery Slab shapes clay through a simple spinning minigame. Fire unfired ceramics in a Kiln.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.mortar: Add water, add a grindable ingredient, then work the pestle until the liquid changes.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.bellows: Aim at a lit Bloomery and hold use to keep the heat alive during long smelts.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.flint_blad: Knap Flint on a hard stone surface. Flint Blades can cut plants and carve the first Crafting Stone.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.bone_blade: Knap Bone on a hard stone surface. Bone Blades are disposable cutting tools for fibers and sticks.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.flint_knif: Knives cut plants like blades, can carve Crafting Stones, and lose durability when used.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.bone_knife: Bone Knives are durable cutting tools. Break grass for fibers, leaves for sticks, or carve a Crafting Stone.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.wooden_kni: Wooden Knives are assembled at the woodworking table from a log and a stick. More durable than bone, a touch less bite — same cutting work.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.chopping_s: A stump holds logs. Add logs, chop with an axe, and collect Firewood from successful swings.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.firewood: Firewood stacks into a campfire by hand: place one on the ground, then add three more.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.fire_stick: Hold use while aiming. Fire Sticks light unlit campfires, open Bloomeries, or valid fire-placement spots.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.fiber_rope: Fiber Rope ties rope fences, hitches leashed rafts, and can reel a rope-tethered spear catch.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.bone_saw: Right-click two adjacent logs with a Bone Saw to form a Woodworking Table.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.woodworkin: Add logs to the table, pick the floating output preview, queue work, then complete the sawing minigame.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.stone_chis: Knapped from two rocks after researching Masonry. Right-click two adjacent Stone or Cobblestone blocks to form a Mason's Bench.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.masons_ben: Add stone to the bench, pick the floating output preview, queue work, then complete the chisel-strike minigame.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.oar: Right-click three straight Thatch blocks with an Oar to lash them into a raft.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.crucible: Drop raw ore into a crucible (50 mB each), heat it in a Bloomery until molten, then pour into a fired mould. Charge copper and tin together to alloy bronze.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.stone_anvi: Place a cast head or blade on the anvil and cold-hammer it with a hammer. The timing minigame sets quality; anneal a brittle piece in a Bloomery to keep working it.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.salt: Hold Salt in one hand and perishable food in the other, then hold use to salt it. Salted food lasts 25% longer and shows Salted in its tooltip.
bannerboundantiquity.jei.info.spoiled_fo: Spoiled or poisoned food contributes no settlement food rate, even when it sits in claimed storage.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.tag.bloomery: Smelting iron without electricity — the Antiquity-era forge.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.bloomery_con: Stack two Mud Bricks where you want a Bloomery.
Right-click the bottom brick with a Block of Coal to form the Bloomery.
Two stones, one block of coal — and a Bloomery is born.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.bloomery_ope: The Bloomery serves as an early method of smelting items
Shift + right-click to swing the door open.
Right-click with ingredients to put inside.
Ignite it. The flames will die down after a while.
Hold a bellows aimed at the Bloomery, to keep the fire going.
When the smelting is done, open the door and right-click empty-handed to take your output.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.tag.kiln.des: Bake clay, ceramics and lime in a clayed-cobblestone cube.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.tag.crucible: Gather a metal charge, melt it in a Bloomery, pour it into moulds.
Scrape, cure and dry raw hides into leather.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.tag.carpentr: Batch-cut logs into planks, stairs and frames.
Batch-dress stone into slabs, stairs, walls and bricks.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.tag.mortar_a: Grind ingredients into dyes, inks and pastes.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.tag.crafting: The off-station bench where flint and stone become the first tools.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.tag.fletchin: Refine arrows through a quality-rolled stretch minigame.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.tag.stone_an: Cast molten metal in moulds and cold-hammer parts into tools.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.woodworking_: The Woodworking Table is two blocks long — place one and the second half follows.
Right-click logs onto the table to build a working budget — sneak adds a whole stack.
A ghost output floats above; the arrows browse what your logs can become. Click to queue it.
Right-click with a Bone Saw and play the sawing minigame to cut the whole batch at once.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.crafting_sto: Right-click a Stone block with a Flint Knife to carve a Crafting Stone.
Right-click materials onto the stone, up to nine. A spinning ghost shows what they'll become.
Sneak + right-click to knap them together — the result pops up off the stone.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.crucible_con: The Crucible is shaped from clay and fired in a Kiln, then set down anywhere.
It is the vessel that carries molten metal — empty, for now.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.crucible_ope: Right-click with smeltable raw metal to drop pieces in — up to eight.
Empty-handed right-click pops the last piece back out.
Place the charged Crucible inside a lit Bloomery to melt it into liquid metal.
Carry the molten Crucible to a Stone Anvil and pour it into a mould to cast.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.fletching_co: Place a Fletching Station — where rough arrows are bound true.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.fletching_op: Right-click the parts onto the station — flint, stick and feather make an arrow.
Sneak + right-click to begin the stretch minigame — play it well for a higher-quality arrow.
When the minigame ends, the finished arrows are handed to you.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.kiln_constru: Right-click Cobblestone with a Clay Ball to make Clayed Cobblestone.
Stack eight of them into a 2×2×2 cube.
The cube collapses into a Kiln — its mouth faces you.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.kiln_operati: The Kiln bakes clay, ceramics and lime — no fuel-hungry furnace required.
Right-click the mouth to load raw material inside.
Light it with Flint & Steel. Feed Coal or Charcoal to stoke the fire.
When the fire dies, right-click empty-handed to collect the fired goods.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.masons_bench: The Mason's Bench is two blocks long — place one half and the other appears.
Stack base stone on the bench to set your budget — sneak adds a whole stack.
The floating ghost shows slabs, stairs, walls and bricks — browse and click to queue.
Right-click with a Stone Chisel and play the strike minigame to dress the whole batch.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.mortar_const: Set down a Mortar & Pestle — the simplest way to grind raw goods into something useful.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.mortar_opera: Some recipes start with water — right-click with a Water Bottle to pour it in.
Right-click the ingredient in. Dyes and inks take a single flower; pastes and powders grind a whole stack at once.
Right-click empty-handed to work the pestle — press down, then grind in circles. Four crushes finish the batch (you'll need Herbalism researched first).
The bowl now holds red dye — right-click a dyeable item to colour up to eight at once. Pastes and powders pop straight out instead.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.stone_anvil_: Right-click a Stone block with a Hammer to dress it into a Stone Anvil.
Set a fired mould on the empty anvil to choose what you'll cast.
Hold right-click with a molten Crucible to pour metal into the mould.
Wait for it to cool and set, then right-click empty-handed to lift out the casting.
Cast parts can then be cold-hammered here: stack them on the anvil and strike with a Hammer to forge a tool.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.tannery_cons: Place a Tanning Rack — a 2×2 frame that holds one hide at a time.
Beside it, stack a Clay Tank. Each piece adds eight buckets of capacity.
bannerboundantiquity.ponder.tannery_oper: Drape a raw hide over the rack.
Right-click with a cutting tool and scrape it clean — six swipes yields Scraped Hide.
Fill the Clay Tank with water...
...then add Quicklime to turn it into curing liquid.
Dip the Scraped Hide to draw a bucket of curing — it becomes a Cured Hide.
Hang the Cured Hide back on the rack to dry.
Once dry, right-click empty-handed to collect finished Leather.
